content: Mary added almost 10,000 sentences to Tatoeba.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by carlosalberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Maria ha aggiunto quasi diecimila frasi a Tatoeba
tok:jan Mewi li pana e linja nimi ale suli tawa lipu Tatowepa lon tenpo pi luka luka lili
lat:Maria ad Tatoeba decem fere milia sententiarum addidit
